mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Meredith, February 1, 1862
mdRecord.dcterms:description: First Lieutenant James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Meredith from Fort Hatteras, North Carolina, discussing the weather, his love for Gertrude, and the delays in the mail.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-1865
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
